positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range viewed at sunrise. The mountains should have sharp, minimalist silhouettes against a vivid gradient sky transitioning from deep indigo to warm peach and fiery orange. Integrate abstract, flowing elements like wispy clouds and stylized celestial patterns (e.g., crescent moon, simple stars) that complement the peaks. The overall aesthetic should be modern, geometric, and inspired by retro-futuristic graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use clean lines and strong visual contrast between the dark foreground elements and the bright, colorful background.
negative: blur, noisy, sketch, text, logo, watermark, signature, low detail, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, photo, realistic, bokeh
